defaultValue: Settings that lock structures increase blueprint spawn rate.

fieldDescription: (REQUIRES PATCHLIB) If true, indevo structures are added to the list of findable industries and are removed from your default list of industries.

(REQUIRES PATCHLIB) If true, most vanilla structures are added to the list of findable industries and are removed from your default list of industries. WARNING: You will not be able to make most structures with this enabled!
